chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANO C. P. No.D-750 of 2025. Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection ‘A’. 2. For hearing of main case. 02.09.2025 Petitioner is present in person. Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Addl. A. G, Sindh. -.-.-.-.-.- Per comments submitted by the respondents, the alleged detainees namely Abdul Kareem, Ghulam Qadir and Ali Jan, have been shown arrested under crime No.54/2025 registered with Police Station Rustam for the offence punishable to Sections 402, 339, 324, 353, 186, 148, 149, PPC. However, the petitioner who is present in person submits that the detainee Mst. Asoodi, per averments made under the petition is aged about 80 years is in the custody of police, whereas, it revealed from the comments submitted on 08.08.2025 by the respondent No.5, that Mst. Asoodi, the alleged detainee is wanted in the aforesaid crime but she has not been arrested so far. The detention of Mst. Asoodi has been vehemently denied by the police officer. Since all the detainees except Mst. Asoodi have been shown arrested by the police and now only Mst. Asoodi remains to be surfaced, therefore, in such situation, instant petition is hereby disposed of with direction to SSP concerned to take more efforts for recovery and production of Mst. Asoodi (the alleged detainee) before the Court having jurisdiction. Judge Judge M.Yousuf Panhwar/**
